title: Tampa Heat Wave
lead: Tampa is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.77. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tampa has brought extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 51%, and the wind speed is moderate at 16.4 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave has significant implications for the city's infrastructure and daily life.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
